title: Tallon (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tallon''' may refer to one of the following:

*'''[[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]]''', a military [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] tactician and [[Navy/Legends|naval]] commander
*The '''[[Tallon Roll/Legends|Tallon Roll]]''', a starfighter maneuver
*The '''[[Tallon split]]''', a starfighter maneuver
*'''[[Target Tallon]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] extraction point on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[NCW-781]]

{{Disambig}}
